Close the heels Prime Minister Narendra Modi's Swachh Bharat Abhiyaan, the Gian Sagar College and Hospital scrubbed clean village Fatehpur Garhi outskirts Rajpura under its Swasth Bharat Abhiyaan.Chairman and Senior Oncologist Dr. Barjinder Singh the institute said that the keeping view the unhygienic conditions prevalent village,s the college decided adopt this village, involve its people and clean the village that has population 800 people."The village comes under village adoption scheme the Gian Sagar Medical College and Hospital. Under this team eight doctors various specialties visited door-to-door for the OPD's the villagers residing the village. The referred patients were provided free bus service, along with the discount their procedures and investigations and well pharmacy, which extended discounts," said.
Having completed the free medical services part its adoption scheme, the team Gian Sagar Medical College and Hospital thereafter took the gargantuan task cleaning and tidying the village. General Manager, Marketing Natasha Chopra added when team reached the village, surroundings and sewer system was pathetic state. "Village's pits were full polybags, waste lay strewn and there were bushes along the road. The drains overflowed with sewer water, which formed puddles road. absence proper bins for dumping garbage, the waste was strewn around the village," she said.
Teams were pided and places were allotted, that the teams can work efficiently and effectively. For this team eleven members were sent the village. After all the formalities and authorities taken from the sarpanch the village, the team started its two days task cleaning the whole village from one corner another.Time time villagers were given knowledge about cleanliness, about cleaning the places, keeping the roads clean. meeting was organized with sarpanch order clarify people about importance maintaining hygiene. Lectures waste management shall organized from time time for the villagers part orientation.Along with the villagers, team from Gian Sagar Medical College worked hard, devoting their time and drained off their sweat Drains were cleaned, big piles garbage were taken off the places where all the garbage was thrown Gian Sagar shall also providing garbage bins the village, that the villagers throw all the trash into the bins. added that instiute aims adopting more villages similar way.
